title: Hades
lyrics: Now it's a little dark, now it's a little dark Can't you see his body's gone? No way to look, no way to turn All the evil you have taken out of you Ooh ooh ooh, what you gonna do? Ah ah ah, bad boy Are they coming for you? Stompin' at you, clear a view Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Ooh ooh ooh ooh, ah Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Ooh ooh ooh ooh, ah Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh I have sold the light once in your eyes Now it's just a pathetic washed in lies I know you can be all you wanna be But this is your extent of your best version That's pathetic, you see I Know you're living in fear With Hades' river crossing your soul No paying the price No one's taking you back, ha No one's wanting that again Now you've just made your home by your ugly self Gone lost out the window, might as well take a break across See the reaper kill yourself and get better See the reaper come around and maybe build The next time you get a shot at life You should analyze it before you're fucking white Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Ooh ooh ooh, I know it's for you As you walk across the valley of the dead inside your mind Realize you're just a pupil of your own design Tell it to your parents or advice you never listen Doesn't matter what's the witness, I say It's all just a mess Inside all the mess you had It's just the rest of nothing That you will never be I'm sorry you're Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Lies and hating out Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh All the ladies now Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh ooh Ooh ooh ooh, ooh ooh ooh Come and play Ladies now There's just one way Now
